commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: And if a house be divided against itself, that house cannot stand. Augustine of Hippo Mention has been made of the unclean spirit whom the Lord shows to be divided against himself. The Holy Spirit, however, is not divided against himself. Rather he makes those whom he gathers together undivided against themselves, by dwelling within those who have been cleansed, that they may be like those of whom it is written in the Acts of the Apostles, “The multitude of them that believed were of one heart and of one soul.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure

advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
